BTC.analyst: Tum yuksek-TF asagi (1h/4h/1d down), MACDh -16.26 -> trend-yonlu short adayi. entry 60039, stop 62150 (~1 ATR), target 55800 (~2 ATR), R:R ~2:1, confidence low. Squeeze riski farkinda.
BTC.challenger: 4 somut kirilma: (1) yorgun-trend kor noktasi (RSI 25.75 + MACDh yataylasma = tukenmis dusus, trend-following en kotu girisi); (2) konsensus negatif funding = kalabalik short -> squeeze yakiti, $62150 stop squeeze menzilinde; (3) 15m=range + 1 ATR stop = erken-yenilme riski; (4) 2 ATR target oversold dipten duz-akis varsayimi kontrol edilmemis. Squeeze+konsensus kombinasyonu 'low confidence yine de ac' esigini ciddi-kirilma tarafina itiyor.
